references.role: global kitchen identity on every Seedance segment
references.prompt: Preserve Licorn island materials, cabinetry colour, countertop lighting continuity across macro and wider shots.

references.role: overhead countertop choreography for parmesan rain, forming, breading, and risotto folds
references.prompt: Lock consistent shadow direction and island edge radius when camera is top-down.

references.role: breathing context for closing satisfaction beat
references.prompt: Use sparingly to re-anchor environment after long macro run.

references.role: tight induction framing for butter foam, wine hiss, and oil shimmer fry physics
references.prompt: Never show open flame; keep glass-ceramic read correct.

references.role: deep saucepan silhouette for risotto and fry pot
references.prompt: Maintain rim height plausible for submerged arancini fry.

references.role: folding rice, scraping pan, gentle fry rotation
references.prompt: Flexible blade profile for starch release shots without exaggerated flex.
Hands stay on-brand with skin tones and cuff details from sheet reference.

references.role: hands for overhead risotto and panure beats
references.prompt: Align wrist angle with Licorn physique when interacting with cookware.

references.role: side-dominant hands for shaping and tearing arancini
references.prompt: Keep shoulders relaxed, focus on tactile finger moves.
Chef faces camera with subtle smile, no exaggerated gesture.
